      if (window.ccc && window.ccc.consent) {
        // Update consent based on user preferences
        gtag('consent', 'update', {

      requestAnimationFrame(function() {
        requestAnimationFrame(function() {
          var banner = document.querySelector('.ccc-banner');

          }

  <!-- UTM parameter handling for forms -->
  <script>
    function getUTMParameterFromCookie(parameterName) {
      // Get the cookie value
      const cookies = document.cookie.split(';');
      let gtmCampaignURL = null;

      for (let i = 0; i < cookies.length; i += 1) {
        const cookie = cookies[i].trim();
        if (cookie.startsWith('__gtm_campaign_url=')) {
          gtmCampaignURL = decodeURIComponent(cookie.substring('__gtm_campaign_url='.length));
          break;
        }
      }

      if (!gtmCampaignURL) {
        return null;
      }

      // Parse the URL to extract the specified query parameter
      const url = new URL(gtmCampaignURL);
      const parameterValue = url.searchParams.get(parameterName);

      return parameterValue || 'null';
    }

    // Retrieve UTM parameter values
    const utmSource = getUTMParameterFromCookie('utm_source');
    const utmMedium = getUTMParameterFromCookie('utm_medium');
    const utmCampaign = getUTMParameterFromCookie('utm_campaign');
    const utmContent = getUTMParameterFromCookie('utm_content');
    const utmTerm = getUTMParameterFromCookie('utm_term');

    // Set the values in the OLAF form inputs if they exist
    const formInputUtmSource = document.getElementById('form-input-utm_source');
    if (formInputUtmSource) {
      formInputUtmSource.value = utmSource || 'null';
    }

    const formInputUtmMedium = document.getElementById('form-input-utm_medium');
    if (formInputUtmMedium) {
      formInputUtmMedium.value = utmMedium || 'null';
    }

    const formInputUtmCampaign = document.getElementById('form-input-utm_campaign');
    if (formInputUtmCampaign) {
      formInputUtmCampaign.value = utmCampaign || 'null';
    }

    const formInputUtmContent = document.getElementById('form-input-utm_content');
    if (formInputUtmContent) {
      formInputUtmContent.value = utmContent || 'null';
    }

    const formInputUtmTerm = document.getElementById('form-input-utm_term');
    if (formInputUtmTerm) {
      formInputUtmTerm.value = utmTerm || 'null';
    }
  </script>

Caron in Pennsylvania

 
 

 1-800-854-6023 
 

 
 

 

 
Caron in Florida

Breakthrough at Caron

 
 

 1-800-213-7834 
 

 
 

 

 
Caron Atlanta Outpatient Center

 
 

 678-543-5718 
 

 
 

 

 
Caron Philadelphia Outpatient Center

 
 

 484-342-5750 
 

 
 

 

 
Encore Outpatient Services

 
 

 703-436-8158 
 

 
 

 

 
Caron Outpatient Treatment Center

 
 

 484-345-4670 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 
Transforming Lives Through Addiction Treatment

 

Caron’s expert staff has helped thousands of people and their families transform their lives, combining neurorestorative care with proven treatment modalities.

 

 
 Start your journey today
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 115k 
 

 
 

 
Patients Served Since 2000

 
 

 
Immersive treatment programs designed for sustainable sobriety

 

 

 

 
 

 

 70 
 

 
 

 
Years of Results

 
 

 
Caron’s been setting standards and delivering real evidence-based treatment since 1957

 

 

 

 
 

 

 90% 
 

 
 

 
of Patients

 
 

 
rated their quality of life as good to very good a year after treatment at Caron

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
Programs

 
 

 

 Comprehensive care for substance use and co-occurring mental health, offering personalized treatment and lasting recovery solutions.
 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
Inpatient treatment

 
 
Patients live at the treatment facility with a structured environment and 24/7 support.

 
 
 Learn more about Inpatient treatment 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
Outpatient Treatment

 
 
Allows patients to receive treatment and support while living at home.

 
 
 Learn more about Outpatient Treatment 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
Family programs

 
 
Dedicated resources for families before, during and after treatment.

 
 
 Learn more about Family programs 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
Resources & Support

 
 
Individualized services for you and your loved one to successfully transition back to everyday life.

 
 
 Learn More about Resources & Support 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
Insurance

 
 

 

 Caron has negotiated in-network contracts with several insurance providers for both inpatient and outpatient care.
 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 Our insurance options
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Pennsylvania

 
 
Caron’s Pennsylvania campus provides inpatient addiction and behavioral health treatment for individuals 16+ with specialized programs for LGBTAIQ+, Healthcare Professionals, executives and more.

 
 
 See Pennsylvania
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Florida

 
 
Caron’s Florida campus provides inpatient and outpatient treatment for addiction and behavioral health for individuals 18+ with specialized programs for affluent adults, Neurocognitive Assessments and professionals.

 
 
 See Florida
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
Ginny

 
 

 "Without Caron, my life would look very different. It would not be full of promise, and hope, and purpose, and honesty. And love."
 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
Steve

 
 

 I didn’t know ‘how’ to get well. And that’s what Caron did for me. They work the whole body. Caron transformed me into a well, healthy here [mind] and here [body] person.
 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
Louis and Stephanie

 
 

 That was like the biggest moment for me at Caron. Because I’m allowed to have feelings and I’m allowed to get upset and I’m allowed to feel like I matter in all of this. And not get in trouble for it.
 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
See what others are saying

 
 

 Read our reviews today!
 

 

 

 
 

 
 Read reviews
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
Community

 
 

 

 Caron offers virtual and in-person recovery services to complement the work you did in treatment and navigate early recovery.
 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
Recovery Services

 
 
Services are offered virtually and include My Recovery Connection.

 
 
 Learn more about Recovery Services about Recovery Services 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
Alumni Community

 
 
Caron’s Alumni Community is a welcoming network of alumni who share their experiences, offer support, and celebrate life in recovery together.

 
 
 Learn more and Alumni Community about Alumni Community 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
Parent and Family Support Groups

 
 
Groups to support loved ones of individuals with substance use disorder and to provide a safe place to find education and hope.

 
 
 Learn more about support groups about Parent and Family Support Groups 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
Breakthrough at Caron

 
 
Caron’s Breakthrough Program offers transformative workshops for individuals, couples, and others.

 
 
 Learn more about Breakthrough about Breakthrough at Caron 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
Upcoming events

 
 

 

 Engaging events supporting recovery, education, and community connection.
 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 View all events
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
2026 Caron Florida Gala

 
 

Friday, March 6th 6:00 PM - 9:30 PM | The Opal Grand Resort and Spa

 

 
 

 

 
 

 
 Event Details
 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
20th Annual Greater New York Community Awards Breakfast

 
 
 
 March 25, 2026 | Mutual of America Building

 

 

 
 

 
 Learn More
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Caron Atlanta 6th Annual Gala

 
 
 
 April 16, 2026 | Piedmont Driving Club

 

 

 
 

 
 Learn More
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Richard J. Caron Award of Excellence Celebration

 
 
 
 April 29, 2026

 

 

 
 

 
 Learn More
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
Can’t attend an event? Here’s how to donate.

 
 

 Your donation directly supports life-changing treatment and recovery programs for those who need them most.
 

 

 

 
 

 
 Make a donation

                                                                                                                                                                                  <div class="wysiwyg container-fluid">
  <h3>Our Mission</h3>
<p> <strong>Transform the lives of individuals
and families by integrating the
science of addiction treatment
with the heart of care</strong></p>
<p>Caron is dedicated to transforming lives impacted by addiction and behavioral health challenges through compassionate, evidence-based care and education. For nearly 70 years, Caron has empowered individuals and families by delivering gender-specific, patient-centric treatment plans rooted in a neurorestorative approach. We offer a full continuum of care—from medical stabilization and detoxification to outpatient services and lifelong recovery support—while advocating for financial accessibility and personalized healing. United by respect and compassion, we strive to restore health, hope, spirituality, and relationships, preparing every person we serve for a future of sustained recovery.</p>
</div>

  <h2>Our Commitment to Quality and Excellence</h2>
<p>Caron Treatment Centers is committed to ongoing performance improvement and has obtained national and state accreditations and licensures for our addiction treatment programs and services.</p>
<p>The Commission on Accreditation of Rehabilitation Facilities (CARF) accreditation holds a person-centered treatment approach and offers field-driven standards for business and program practices. With its adherence to CARF’s core values and mission to “promote the quality, value, and optimal outcomes of services through a consultative accreditation process that centers on enhancing the lives of persons served,” the accreditation process ensures a continuous improvement model.<br /></p>
<p>In selecting CARF for accreditation along with various state licensures, Caron Treatment Centers has chosen to hold itself to the highest level of standards of practice. It also means we have committed to meet our patients’ and families’ individual needs and continually deliver the best behavioral health and addiction treatment.<br /></p>
<h3>CARF Behavioral Health Accreditations<br /></h3>

        <script src='https://unpkg.com/focus-within-polyfill@5.2.1/dist/focus-within-polyfill.js'></script>

                  
  

  <!-- UTM parameter handling for forms -->
  <script>
    function getUTMParameterFromCookie(parameterName) {
      // Get the cookie value
      const cookies = document.cookie.split(';');
      let gtmCampaignURL = null;

      for (let i = 0; i < cookies.length; i += 1) {
        const cookie = cookies[i].trim();
        if (cookie.startsWith('__gtm_campaign_url=')) {
          gtmCampaignURL = decodeURIComponent(cookie.substring('__gtm_campaign_url='.length));
          break;
        }
      }

      if (!gtmCampaignURL) {
        return null;
      }

      // Parse the URL to extract the specified query parameter
      const url = new URL(gtmCampaignURL);
      const parameterValue = url.searchParams.get(parameterName);

      return parameterValue || 'null';
    }

    // Retrieve UTM parameter values
    const utmSource = getUTMParameterFromCookie('utm_source');
    const utmMedium = getUTMParameterFromCookie('utm_medium');
    const utmCampaign = getUTMParameterFromCookie('utm_campaign');
    const utmContent = getUTMParameterFromCookie('utm_content');
    const utmTerm = getUTMParameterFromCookie('utm_term');

    // Set the values in the OLAF form inputs if they exist
    const formInputUtmSource = document.getElementById('form-input-utm_source');
    if (formInputUtmSource) {
      formInputUtmSource.value = utmSource || 'null';
    }

    const formInputUtmMedium = document.getElementById('form-input-utm_medium');
    if (formInputUtmMedium) {
      formInputUtmMedium.value = utmMedium || 'null';
    }

    const formInputUtmCampaign = document.getElementById('form-input-utm_campaign');
    if (formInputUtmCampaign) {
      formInputUtmCampaign.value = utmCampaign || 'null';
    }

    const formInputUtmContent = document.getElementById('form-input-utm_content');
    if (formInputUtmContent) {
      formInputUtmContent.value = utmContent || 'null';
    }

    const formInputUtmTerm = document.getElementById('form-input-utm_term');
    if (formInputUtmTerm) {
      formInputUtmTerm.value = utmTerm || 'null';
    }
  </script>

Caron in Pennsylvania

Caron in Florida

Breakthrough at Caron

 
 

 1-800-213-7834 
 

 
 

 

 
Caron Atlanta Outpatient Center

 
 

 678-543-5718 
 

 
 

 

 
Caron Philadelphia Outpatient Center

 
 

 484-342-5750 
 

 
 

 

 
Encore Outpatient Services

 
 

 703-436-8158 
 

 
 

 

 
Caron Outpatient Treatment Center

 
 

 484-345-4670 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 
About Caron

 
Richard and Catherine Caron’s legacy continues to permeate our work today through the spirit of innovation and passionate dedication to our patients and their families. We believe in loving our patients until they can love themselves.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
Why Caron?

For nearly 70 years, Caron has helped thousands of individuals struggling with substance use disorder and their families begin to manage this chronic, treatable disease.

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 Caron provides a continuum of care for young adults , women, men, and older adults. Caron’s signature programming provides concierge treatment for executives and older adults.

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Our approach works. Results from independent insurance data shows Caron's rate of recovery is higher than all providers in the studies and its rate of readmission is lower.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Our treatment is accessible. Through partnerships with in network insurance providers and financial assistance, Caron makes its evidence-based quality treatment available to individuals and families.

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Caron provides services in Wernersville, Wyomissing and Philadelphia, Pennsylvania; Delray Beach, Florida; Washington, D.C. metro; Atlanta; and New York City.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
Our Mission

 Transform the lives of individuals
and families by integrating the
science of addiction treatment
with the heart of care 

Caron is dedicated to transforming lives impacted by addiction and behavioral health challenges through compassionate, evidence-based care and education. For nearly 70 years, Caron has empowered individuals and families by delivering gender-specific, patient-centric treatment plans rooted in a neurorestorative approach. We offer a full continuum of care—from medical stabilization and detoxification to outpatient services and lifelong recovery support—while advocating for financial accessibility and personalized healing. United by respect and compassion, we strive to restore health, hope, spirituality, and relationships, preparing every person we serve for a future of sustained recovery.

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
Our Vision

Revolutionize addiction treatment to achieve recovery for life

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
Licenses and Accreditations

Adhering to the highest level of practice standards

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
Our Commitment to Quality and Excellence

Caron Treatment Centers is committed to ongoing performance improvement and has obtained national and state accreditations and licensures for our addiction treatment programs and services.

The Commission on Accreditation of Rehabilitation Facilities (CARF) accreditation holds a person-centered treatment approach and offers field-driven standards for business and program practices. With its adherence to CARF’s core values and mission to “promote the quality, value, and optimal outcomes of services through a consultative accreditation process that centers on enhancing the lives of persons served,” the accreditation process ensures a continuous improvement model.

In selecting CARF for accreditation along with various state licensures, Caron Treatment Centers has chosen to hold itself to the highest level of standards of practice. It also means we have committed to meet our patients’ and families’ individual needs and continually deliver the best behavioral health and addiction treatment.

CARF Behavioral Health Accreditations

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 Caron Pennsylvania in Wernersville, Pennsylvania
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Caron Florida in Delray Beach, Florida
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Caron Atlanta Outpatient Treatment Center
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Caron Philadelphia Outpatient Treatment Center in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Caron Outpatient Treatment Center in Wyomissing, Pennsylvania
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
CARF ASAM Level of Care Certification

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 Caron Pennsylvania in Wernersville, Pa., also holds the CARF American Society of Addiction Medicine (ASAM) Level of Care certification. CARF awards the ASAM Level of Care certification to addiction treatment programs that demonstrate the capacity to deliver services consistent with a specific level of care described in the ASAM criteria. The certification helps patients, families, and loved ones identify treatment programs that are capable of delivering evidence-based care.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
State-Level Licenses

Our treatment programs are licensed on a state-level.

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 Caron Pennsylvania inpatient facilities are licensed by the Pennsylvania Department of Drug and Alcohol Program (DDAP) Licensure.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Caron Florida is licensed by the Florida Department of Children and Families (DCF) and the Agency of Health Care Administration (AHCA) for a primary diagnosis in mental health and/or substance use disorder.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Caron Atlanta Outpatient Treatment Center in Atlanta, Georgia is licensed by the Georgia Department of Community Health.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Encore Outpatient Services is licensed by the Virginia Department of Behavioral Health and Developmental Services.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
Within each state, we also have licensed levels of care:

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 Caron Pennsylvania in Wernersville is licensed for inpatient non-hospital short-term detoxification services; inpatient non-hospital residential and rehabilitation services; and a partial hospitalization program (PHP).
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Caron Philadelphia Outpatient Treatment Center in Plymouth Meeting, PA is licensed for outpatient services.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Caron Outpatient Treatment Center in Wyomissing, PA is licensed for partial hospitalization services and outpatient services.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Caron Florida is licensed for detoxification and Residential Level 2 for its Older Adult and Ocean Drive residential programs at The Keele Center.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Caron Florida's Renaissance Program and Ocean Drive programs are licensed for day or night with community housing, day or night program, intensive outpatient, outpatient treatment, and aftercare services.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Caron Florida's Mental Health Program is licensed by Agency of Health Care Administration (AHCA).
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Caron Atlanta Outpatient Treatment Center is licensed for outpatient drug abuse treatment and education services.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Encore Outpatient Services is licensed to provide partial hospitalization and intensive outpatient services.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
SAMHSA Opioid Treatment Program Certification

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 In addition to its state license, Caron Pennsylvania holds an Opioid Treatment Program certification from the Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration (SAMHSA), an agency within the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS).
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
Take the next step:

    <script>
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}

    // OPT-OUT: Default to granted (cookies enabled by default)
    gtag('consent', 'default', {
      'analytics_storage': 'granted',
      'ad_storage': 'granted',
      'ad_user_data': 'granted',
      'ad_personalization': 'granted'
    });

    // Listen for cookie consent changes and update GTM
    window.addEventListener('ccc.loaded', function(e) {
      if (window.ccc && window.ccc.consent) {
        // Update consent based on user preferences
        gtag('consent', 'update', {
          'analytics_storage': window.ccc.consent.statistics ? 'granted' : 'denied',
          'ad_storage': window.ccc.consent.marketing ? 'granted' : 'denied',
          'ad_user_data': window.ccc.consent.marketing ? 'granted' : 'denied',
          'ad_personalization': window.ccc.consent.marketing ? 'granted' : 'denied'
        });
      }

      // Performance optimization: Show banner after LCP to avoid layout shift
      // Use double RAF to ensure LCP has been captured
      requestAnimationFrame(function() {
        requestAnimationFrame(function() {
          var banner = document.querySelector('.ccc-banner');
          if (banner) {
            banner.classList.add('ccc-banner--visible');
          }
        });
      });
    });

                      <h2 class="media-context__heading h2 text-dark">What to Expect When You Call Caron Treatment Centers</h2>
                                <div class="media-context__p p1">If you or a loved one is considering inpatient treatment, we’ll break down everything you need to know.</div>
                            </div>
      </div>
      </div>
</div>
	



    

</div>
  
    
    
<div class="flexible-content flexible-content--body">
  
                                                                                                                                                                                  <div class="wysiwyg container-fluid">
  <p dir="ltr">At Caron Treatment Centers, we strive to provide the highest standard of care for our patients. Whether you’re seeking <a href="https://www.caron.org/addiction-101/substance-abuse/inpatient-or-outpatient-what-to-consider-when-seeking-help-for-substance-use">inpatient or outpatient treatment</a>, there are a few key steps to take on your journey toward recovery.<br /></p>
</div>
  

    

</div>
  
    
    
<div class="flexible-content flexible-content--body">
  
                                                                                                                                                                                  <div class="wysiwyg container-fluid">
  <figure><img src="https://deln1jxmpfoj4.cloudfront.net/Becoming-a-patient_2024-09-16-165623_htlv.png" alt="How to Become a Patient" /></figure>
<p style="text-align: center"></p>
</div>
  

    

</div>
  
    
    
<div class="flexible-content flexible-content--body">
  
                                                                                                                                                                                  <div class="wysiwyg container-fluid">
  <h2>What to Expect During Inpatient Treatment<br /></h2>
<p><a href="https://www.caron.org/inpatient-treatment">Inpatient care</a> provides a safe and structured environment for our patients. During inpatient treatment, you will be provided with 24-hour care and support from our professional staff.</p>
<p>Here are the steps you can expect:</p>
<h3>Assessment</h3>
<p>The first step in the inpatient treatment process is an assessment. Our team will work to understand your unique needs and goals so we can tailor a treatment plan specifically designed for your recovery needs.</p>
<h3>Intake Process</h3>
<p dir="ltr">Our knowledgeable intake staff is here to walk you through the admissions process and answer any questions you may have. Our team will help coordinate your <a href="https://www.caron.org/lp/insurance-options">insurance plan</a>, review any special needs you may require, and complete all necessary paperwork to ensure a smooth transition into treatment. Every patient has a multidisciplinary treatment team that consists of the primary case manager, medical director, spiritual counselor (unless declined), and a member of the financial staff.</p>
<p dir="ltr">A standard week for inpatient recovery care includes individual, group, and family therapy sessions, meetings with clinical and medical staff, medication management, recreational activities, and more.</p>
<h3>Detox</h3>
<p>At the beginning of treatment, you may also need to undergo a <a href="https://www.caron.org/blog/what-does-detox-mean">detoxification</a> process. Our medical staff is on-site 24/7 to ensure that detox is managed in a safe and comfortable environment.</p>
<h3>Therapy</h3>
<p>Inpatient treatment offers a variety of therapy options to ensure that each patient receives the support and evidence-based treatment they need. This can include cognitive behavioral therapy, experiential therapies, mindfulness-based practices, and more.</p>
<h3>Aftercare</h3>
<p dir="ltr">At Caron Treatment Centers, we understand that recovery is an ongoing process. That’s why we offer comprehensive services to ensure our patients have the resources and support they need as they continue on their journey toward long-term recovery.</p>
<p>Those comprehensive services may include <a href="https://www.caron.org/recovery-programs/recovery-community">alumni support activities</a>, personalized continuing care plans, <a href="https://www.caron.org/recovery-programs/my-recovery-connection">My Recovery Connection</a> (requires an additional cost), outpatient treatment centers, <a href="https://www.caron.org/recovery-programs/recovery-support-services?token=WbEKD9cwiaASNnh4Ao0BP0_X4mWhZQ2O">recovery support services</a>, and more.</p>
<h2>Visit Caron Treatment Centers to Start the Road to Recovery</h2>
<p>At Caron Treatment Centers, our goal is to help those struggling with <a href="https://www.caron.org/addiction-101/substance-abuse/what-is-substance-addiction">substance use disorder</a> get the help they need. <a href="https://www.caron.org/our-team">Our staff</a> of dedicated professionals will work together with you and your family to create a customized treatment plan that fits your specific needs.</p>
<h3>Caron Inpatient Treatment Center Locations</h3>
<p dir="ltr">We offer inpatient treatment in two locations on the East coast: <br /></p>
<ul><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr"><a href="https://www.caron.org/locations/caron-pennsylvania"><strong>Pennsylvania</strong></a><strong>: </strong>Located in Wernersville, our Pennsylvania center was recognized as one of <a href="https://www.caron.org/news-resources/americas-best-addiction-treatment-centers-2023">America's best addiction treatment centers</a> in 2023 by Newsweek.</p></li><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr"><a href="https://www.caron.org/locations/caron-florida"><strong>Florida</strong></a><strong>: </strong>Our Florida center, located in Delray Beach, offers three distinct rehabilitation facilities, including a new state-of-the-art medical center.</p></li></ul>
<p>We understand how important recovery is and pledge to provide you with the highest quality care in order to ensure long-term sobriety. If you or someone you love is ready to get started on the road to recovery, <a href="https://www.caron.org/">contact us today</a>.</p>
</div>
  

    

</div>
  
    
    
<div class="flexible-content flexible-content--body">
  
                                                                                                                                                                                  <div class="wysiwyg container-fluid">
  <h2>Get the Guidance You Need.</h2>
<figure style="float:right;width:234px;max-width:234px;margin-left:20px;margin-right:20px;"><a href="https://www.caron.org/news-resources/americas-best-addiction-treatment-centers-2023"><img src="https://deln1jxmpfoj4.cloudfront.net/Logos/Media-logos/_small/Newsweek_US-BATC2024_Logo_Basic.png" alt="America's Best Addiction Treatment Centers - Caron" width="234" height="290" /></a></figure>
<p dir="ltr">A fulfilling life beyond addiction is just a call away. When you call our team, you will immediately feel the difference. Our expert admissions specialists believe that caring is the foundation of Caron and are passionate about helping you start your recovery journey. The specialist is your guide and source of all the information you need about how the admissions process works.</p>
<p dir="ltr">Admissions specialists work closely with you, your loved ones, your therapist, and Caron’s clinical and medical teams to determine the level of care you (or your loved one) need.<br /></p>
</div>
  

    

</div>

                                                                                                                                                                                  <div class="wysiwyg container-fluid">
  <p>Please note: Patients suffering from significant medical and psychological issues must be stable before beginning treatment at any Caron location/program, as we are not an acute care facility. Your admissions specialist can help you arrange transfers from hospitals and other healthcare centers if necessary.<br /></p>
</div>
  

    

</div>
  
    
    
<div class="flexible-content flexible-content--body">
  
                                                                                                                                                                                  <div class="wysiwyg container-fluid">
  <h3>Scheduling Your Comprehensive Admission</h3>
<p>Once you or your loved one has agreed to treatment, it's time to set an admission date. Because we understand the need for urgency, we can work with you to get the process done quickly. That includes admission to our <a href="https://www.caron.org/treatment-programs/detox-services">onsite detox units</a> at <a href="https://www.caron.org/treatment-programs/ocean-drive-florida">Caron's Florida</a> or Pennsylvania campuses on short notice if needed. The admissions process will vary depending on the program that is right for you.</p>
</div>
  

    

</div>

  <!-- UTM parameter handling for forms -->
  <script>
    function getUTMParameterFromCookie(parameterName) {
      // Get the cookie value
      const cookies = document.cookie.split(';');
      let gtmCampaignURL = null;

      for (let i = 0; i < cookies.length; i += 1) {
        const cookie = cookies[i].trim();
        if (cookie.startsWith('__gtm_campaign_url=')) {
          gtmCampaignURL = decodeURIComponent(cookie.substring('__gtm_campaign_url='.length));
          break;
        }
      }

      if (!gtmCampaignURL) {
        return null;
      }

      // Parse the URL to extract the specified query parameter
      const url = new URL(gtmCampaignURL);
      const parameterValue = url.searchParams.get(parameterName);

      return parameterValue || 'null';
    }

    // Retrieve UTM parameter values
    const utmSource = getUTMParameterFromCookie('utm_source');
    const utmMedium = getUTMParameterFromCookie('utm_medium');
    const utmCampaign = getUTMParameterFromCookie('utm_campaign');
    const utmContent = getUTMParameterFromCookie('utm_content');
    const utmTerm = getUTMParameterFromCookie('utm_term');

    // Set the values in the OLAF form inputs if they exist
    const formInputUtmSource = document.getElementById('form-input-utm_source');
    if (formInputUtmSource) {
      formInputUtmSource.value = utmSource || 'null';
    }

    const formInputUtmMedium = document.getElementById('form-input-utm_medium');
    if (formInputUtmMedium) {
      formInputUtmMedium.value = utmMedium || 'null';
    }

    const formInputUtmCampaign = document.getElementById('form-input-utm_campaign');
    if (formInputUtmCampaign) {
      formInputUtmCampaign.value = utmCampaign || 'null';
    }

    const formInputUtmContent = document.getElementById('form-input-utm_content');
    if (formInputUtmContent) {
      formInputUtmContent.value = utmContent || 'null';
    }

    const formInputUtmTerm = document.getElementById('form-input-utm_term');
    if (formInputUtmTerm) {
      formInputUtmTerm.value = utmTerm || 'null';
    }
  </script>

 Becoming a Patient
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 Admissions
 

 
Become a Patient

 
It begins with a call.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
What to Expect When You Call Caron Treatment Centers

 
If you or a loved one is considering inpatient treatment, we’ll break down everything you need to know.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
At Caron Treatment Centers, we strive to provide the highest standard of care for our patients. Whether you’re seeking inpatient or outpatient treatment , there are a few key steps to take on your journey toward recovery.

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
What to Expect During Inpatient Treatment

 Inpatient care provides a safe and structured environment for our patients. During inpatient treatment, you will be provided with 24-hour care and support from our professional staff.

Here are the steps you can expect:

Assessment

The first step in the inpatient treatment process is an assessment. Our team will work to understand your unique needs and goals so we can tailor a treatment plan specifically designed for your recovery needs.

Intake Process

Our knowledgeable intake staff is here to walk you through the admissions process and answer any questions you may have. Our team will help coordinate your insurance plan , review any special needs you may require, and complete all necessary paperwork to ensure a smooth transition into treatment. Every patient has a multidisciplinary treatment team that consists of the primary case manager, medical director, spiritual counselor (unless declined), and a member of the financial staff.

A standard week for inpatient recovery care includes individual, group, and family therapy sessions, meetings with clinical and medical staff, medication management, recreational activities, and more.

Detox

At the beginning of treatment, you may also need to undergo a detoxification process. Our medical staff is on-site 24/7 to ensure that detox is managed in a safe and comfortable environment.

Therapy

Inpatient treatment offers a variety of therapy options to ensure that each patient receives the support and evidence-based treatment they need. This can include cognitive behavioral therapy, experiential therapies, mindfulness-based practices, and more.

Aftercare

At Caron Treatment Centers, we understand that recovery is an ongoing process. That’s why we offer comprehensive services to ensure our patients have the resources and support they need as they continue on their journey toward long-term recovery.

Those comprehensive services may include alumni support activities , personalized continuing care plans, My Recovery Connection (requires an additional cost), outpatient treatment centers, recovery support services , and more.

Visit Caron Treatment Centers to Start the Road to Recovery

At Caron Treatment Centers, our goal is to help those struggling with substance use disorder get the help they need. Our staff of dedicated professionals will work together with you and your family to create a customized treatment plan that fits your specific needs.

Caron Inpatient Treatment Center Locations

We offer inpatient treatment in two locations on the East coast: 

 

 Pennsylvania : Located in Wernersville, our Pennsylvania center was recognized as one of America's best addiction treatment centers in 2023 by Newsweek.

 Florida : Our Florida center, located in Delray Beach, offers three distinct rehabilitation facilities, including a new state-of-the-art medical center.

 

We understand how important recovery is and pledge to provide you with the highest quality care in order to ensure long-term sobriety. If you or someone you love is ready to get started on the road to recovery, contact us today .

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
Get the Guidance You Need.

 

A fulfilling life beyond addiction is just a call away. When you call our team, you will immediately feel the difference. Our expert admissions specialists believe that caring is the foundation of Caron and are passionate about helping you start your recovery journey. The specialist is your guide and source of all the information you need about how the admissions process works.

Admissions specialists work closely with you, your loved ones, your therapist, and Caron’s clinical and medical teams to determine the level of care you (or your loved one) need.

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 Precipitating events.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Mental health history.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Substance use and medical history.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Family structure/dynamics and issues.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Legal history.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Career and education.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Your current therapist and physicians that you are seeing.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Contact information.
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
Please note: Patients suffering from significant medical and psychological issues must be stable before beginning treatment at any Caron location/program, as we are not an acute care facility. Your admissions specialist can help you arrange transfers from hospitals and other healthcare centers if necessary.

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
Scheduling Your Comprehensive Admission

Once you or your loved one has agreed to treatment, it's time to set an admission date. Because we understand the need for urgency, we can work with you to get the process done quickly. That includes admission to our onsite detox units at Caron's Florida or Pennsylvania campuses on short notice if needed. The admissions process will vary depending on the program that is right for you.

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
Ready to get started?

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 Give us a call. 

 
 
 
Give us a call.

 Contact now 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 Tour our facilities. 

 
 
 
Tour our facilities.

 Schedule now 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 If your loved one is not ready. 

 
 
 
If your loved one is not ready.

 Learn more 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 What is the mailing address, can you send care packages, etc.?
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
243 N Galen Hall Rd

Wernersville, PA 19565

 

 

 

 

 

 
 Are we Dual Diagnosis?
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
Licensures differ by state. Our facilities in Florida, Caron Renaissance and Caron Ocean Drive, are state licensed (AHCA and DCF) to treat dual diagnosis in patients with a primary diagnosis in mental health and/or substance use disorder. At Caron Pennsylvania, we are licensed to treat a primary diagnosis of substance use disorder and mental health as a secondary diagnosis. Click here to learn more. ( https://www.caron.org/about-ca... ).

 

 

 

 

 

 
 Can I use my cell phone, tablet, etc?
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
Every Caron program has different policies regarding cell phone and tablet use. When you are admitted to a particular program, you will receive guidance on what incoming patients can bring, what they cannot bring, what they should pack, etc.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 Do you treat mental health issues w/o substance abuse?
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
Licensures differ by state. Our facilities in Florida, Caron Renaissance and Caron Ocean Drive, are state licensed (AHCA and DCF) to treat a primary diagnosis in mental health and/or substance use disorder. At Caron Pennsylvania, we are licensed to treat a primary diagnosis of substance use disorder and can treat mental health as a secondary diagnosis. Click here to learn more. ( https://www.caron.org/about-ca... ).

 

 

 

 

 

 
 What insurance networks cover treatment at Caron?
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
We work with many insurance networks. The full list can be found here .

 

 

 

 

 

 
 What is the cost of inpatient treatment w/o insurance?
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
Because treatment is personalized for our patients, we do not have a set fee. Some of the variables in the cost of treatment include the specific treatment program that is right for you and the additional services or support you need or choose.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 Do we have scholarships or grants?
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
Financial assistance is available through a limited number of scholarships for individuals who qualify through an application process. Also, there are various options available to pay for treatment at Caron. Click here to learn more.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 What to pack?
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
Prior to arrival, the admissions team at the Caron program you are attending will provide information regarding what you should pack. Each program has different recommendations.

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
Take the next step:

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
Start with an online form

Our medical staff is on-site 24/7 to ensure that detox is managed in a safe and comfortable environment.
That includes admission to our onsite detox units at Caron's Florida or Pennsylvania campuses on short notice if needed.

rawMentions: Healthcare Residential Assessment
Aviation Residential Assessment
Adult Residential Program
Differences Between Inpatient & Outpatient
Inpatient Locations
Inpatient treatment
Learn more about Inpatient treatment
Caron has negotiated in-network contracts with several insurance providers for both inpatient and outpatient care.
Caron’s Pennsylvania campus provides inpatient addiction and behavioral health treatment for individuals 16+ with specialized programs for LGBTAIQ+, Healthcare Professionals, executives and more.

Caron’s Florida campus provides inpatient and outpatient treatment for addiction and behavioral health for individuals 18+ with specialized programs for affluent adults, Neurocognitive Assessments and professionals.

Caron Pennsylvania in Wernersville is licensed for inpatient non-hospital short-term detoxification services; inpatient non-hospital residential and rehabilitation services; and a partial hospitalization program (PHP).
Caron Florida is licensed for detoxification and Residential Level 2 for its Older Adult and Ocean Drive residential programs at The Keele Center.
Caron Pennsylvania inpatient facilities are licensed by the Pennsylvania Department of Drug and Alcohol Program (DDAP) Licensure.
If you or a loved one is considering inpatient treatment, we’ll break down everything you need to know.
Whether you’re seeking inpatient or outpatient treatment , there are a few key steps to take on your journey toward recovery.
What to Expect During Inpatient Treatment
Inpatient care provides a safe and structured environment for our patients.
During inpatient treatment, you will be provided with 24-hour care and support from our professional staff.
The first step in the inpatient treatment process is an assessment.

A standard week for inpatient recovery care includes individual, group, and family therapy sessions, meetings with clinical and medical staff, medication management, recreational activities, and more.
Inpatient treatment offers a variety of therapy options to ensure that each patient receives the support and evidence-based treatment they need.
Caron Inpatient Treatment Center Locations
We offer inpatient treatment in two locations on the East coast:
What is the cost of inpatient treatment w/o insurance?

rawMentions: Caron Atlanta Outpatient Center
Caron Philadelphia Outpatient Center
Encore Outpatient Services
Caron Outpatient Treatment Center
Differences Between Inpatient & Outpatient
Outpatient Treatment
Outpatient Locations
Learn more about Outpatient Treatment
Caron has negotiated in-network contracts with several insurance providers for both inpatient and outpatient care.

Caron’s Florida campus provides inpatient and outpatient treatment for addiction and behavioral health for individuals 18+ with specialized programs for affluent adults, Neurocognitive Assessments and professionals.

We offer a full continuum of care—from medical stabilization and detoxification to outpatient services and lifelong recovery support—while advocating for financial accessibility and personalized healing.
Caron Atlanta Outpatient Treatment Center
Caron Philadelphia Outpatient Treatment Center in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania
Caron Outpatient Treatment Center in Wyomissing, Pennsylvania
Caron Atlanta Outpatient Treatment Center in Atlanta, Georgia is licensed by the Georgia Department of Community Health.
Encore Outpatient Services is licensed by the Virginia Department of Behavioral Health and Developmental Services.
Caron Philadelphia Outpatient Treatment Center in Plymouth Meeting, PA is licensed for outpatient services.
Caron Outpatient Treatment Center in Wyomissing, PA is licensed for partial hospitalization services and outpatient services.

Caron Florida's Renaissance Program and Ocean Drive programs are licensed for day or night with community housing, day or night program, intensive outpatient, outpatient treatment, and aftercare services.
Caron Atlanta Outpatient Treatment Center is licensed for outpatient drug abuse treatment and education services.
Encore Outpatient Services is licensed to provide partial hospitalization and intensive outpatient services.
Whether you’re seeking inpatient or outpatient treatment , there are a few key steps to take on your journey toward recovery.

Those comprehensive services may include alumni support activities , personalized continuing care plans, My Recovery Connection (requires an additional cost), outpatient treatment centers, recovery support services , and more.

rawMentions: Co-occurring Disorders
Comprehensive care for substance use and co-occurring mental health, offering personalized treatment and lasting recovery solutions.
Are we Dual Diagnosis?

Our facilities in Florida, Caron Renaissance and Caron Ocean Drive, are state licensed (AHCA and DCF) to treat dual diagnosis in patients with a primary diagnosis in mental health and/or substance use disorder.
